assertions.assertion: Creates a class that extends DynamicClientRegistrationValidator
Overrides ValidateGrantTypesAsync to reject grant types other than authorization_code
assertions.rationale: Checks for non-authorization_code grant types and calls SetError

assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateRedirectUrisAsync to enforce HTTPS on all redirect URIs
assertions.rationale: Checks all URIs for https:// prefix

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePkce = true in SetClientDefaultsAsync or equivalent override
Registers the validator using AddDynamicClientRegistrationValidator<T>() on the configuration builder
